\tzpentry{ID3890}{Kaluza-Klein Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3890 introduces Kaluza-Klein Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{\text{res}} = \frac{2\pi c}{R_{KK}} \sqrt{m_{KK}^2 + \left(\frac{R_{KK}\omega_0}{2\pi c}\right)^2} \end{equation}
